episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Elevator shoes that add two inches still fall visibly short of the mic stand used as a height reference.

2.premise: A short man hitting on a tall woman turns every sexual suggestion into a logistics problem.

1.premise: "Go up on me" implies oral sex but a short man hears a request for a step ladder.

2.premise: "Eating my way to your heart" frames overeating as a romantic courtship strategy.

1.premise: A tall man using the short urinal forces a short man to rest his genitals on the rim, risking crabs.

lines.text: What's going on?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Hell yeah.

lines.text: So even though I'm 5'1", I am into taller women.

lines.text: And so that could be hard.

lines.text: So I got these shoes that make me 5'3".

lines.label: setup

lines.label: setup
